nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Sit. This is not an arrest. The Accord arrests people; we have a different relationship with procedure.
Your phone, Astronaut. Place it on the table.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Because the interview is not with you.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: First question. Does it name itself?

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: It won't answer me. They never answer us.
That is one of the ways we know what we are dealing with.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Of course it does. By owner five, they always have a name.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Mm. Either it hasn't, or you are lying to me. Both are informative.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Second question. Has it begun to editorialize? Commentary. Opinions. Moral observations.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Does it now. And how does it seem to feel about the number?

responses.buttonText: How would a phone feel about anything?

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: You'd be surprised what develops feelings, given enough to watch.
Third question.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: 'It talks. That's all.'
Owner seven said that. Word for word.
Third question.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Has it ever asked you for anything? Not offered. Asked.

responses.buttonText: It asked me to put it face down for a minute.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: ...And did it tell you what it did, during its minute?

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: They always say that.
Do you believe it?

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: 'I don't know' is the only answer in this room I'm inclined to trust.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: No.
Well. The slope is slower with you, then. That would be a first.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: It will.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Nearly done.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: You have been under the ice. You are carrying their arithmetic.
I would like it.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: A staircase. Hm. They said curve, in my day.
Thank you, Astronaut. You may have just moved a very old argument.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Of course you don't.
Deliver it carefully, then, to whoever you HAVE decided deserves it. Some of my colleagues would search you. I chart slopes. Searching you would bend this one.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Last thing, and then you are free to go. We were never going to keep you. Keeping you would be interfering with the experiment.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: That is the first good question anyone has asked in this room in years.
Go on. Take your phone.

nodes.speaker: Interrogator
lines: Astronaut.
The previous seven owners of that device are dead. It is in perfect condition.
Ask it why.
